title: Laser's Armor Trims Plus
description: Adds new Armor Trim materials, and lets you use Banner Patterns and Pottery Sherds as Armor Trim patterns!
body:
![Laser's Armor Trims Plus](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/data-pack/2024/135/17878624_l.webp)
# **Laser's Armor Trims Plus!**
This is a simple data pack that adds to 1.20's armor trims by adding new Trim Materials, and new Trim Templates for each of the Banner Patterns and Pottery Sherds! (Also adds recipes to duplicate them, so they're more accessible and renewable).

### **IMPORTANT:** _This pack has a required resource pack! It won't work without it (be sure to click on the version's name intsead of just clicking "download" otherwise you'll miss it!)_

If you have any questions, need extre info about my packs, or just want to hang out, then consider joining my public Discord: https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg

**Adds/changed all of the following Trim Materials:**
- Netherite Scrap
- Coal
- Flint
- Glowstone Dust
- Glow Ink Sac
- Echo Shard
- Prismarine Shard
- Prismarine Crystal
- Popped Chorus Fruit
- Nautilus Shell
- Turtle Scute
- Armadillo Scute
- Leather
- Rabbit Hide
- Phantom Membrane
- Gunpowder
- Dragon's Breath
- Slime Ball
- Magma Cream
- Ender Pearl
- Nether Star
- Blaze Rod
- Breeze Rod
- Clay
- Sugar
- Brick
- Nether Brick

**Lets you use Banner Patterns and Pottery Sherds as Armor Trim Templates, with new designs for each one. It adds the following patterns:**
- Creeper Trim
- "Thing" Trim
- Flower Trim
- Globe Trim
- Snout Trim
- Explorer Trim
- Heart Trim
- Heartbreak Trim
- Friend Trim
- Snort Trim
- Danger Trim
- Shelter Trim
- Burn Trim
- Plenty Trim
- Prize Trim
- Mourner Trim
- Miner Trim
- Angler Trim
- Archer Trim
- Brewer Trim
- Blade Trim
- Arms Up Trim
- Howl Trim
- Sheaf Trim
- Skull Trim
- Crossbones Trim
- Guster Trim
- Breeze Trim
- Swirl Trim
- Surge Trim
- Scrape Trim
- Brute Trim (replaces the snout trim template)
- Netherite Trim (using the Netherite Armor Upgrade)
- Mason Trim (Field Masoned Banner Pattern)
- Bordure Trim (Bordure Indented Banner Pattern)

**_Notes:_**
The Snout Banner Pattern is now used to get the old Snout Trim, and the Trim Template for it has been switched over to the "Brute" armor trim instead.

The Netherite Upgrade can now be used to apply the "Netherite Trim" to any armor set... However, it won't work with Netherite Ingots, to avoid players making "fake" Netherite armor.

The Emerald, Copper, and Netherite trim palettes have been slightly altered to have more accurate colors, and to compensate for the addition of the Scute, Leather, and Coal armor trims that more closely resemble the vanilla palettes.
